preregistration: this file, committed together with the slim draft BEFORE any generation (record-first). The follow-up itself is prescribed by ep-partition's first kill condition (issue #244 -> #248): conceptual content measured inert, so the skill slims to its operational core and the slim body is re-measured vs current on the same battery before shipping (ADR 0024 loop).
design: 3-arm hermetic re-measure: without / with-full / with-slim. Treatment construction (07-09/ep-partition pattern): stripped SKILL.md body + 3 touched references, filename-headered. with-full is pinned at pre-slim main (full_commit below) via git show; with-slim is the working-tree slim draft verbatim (what would ship). Tests whether the hand-shipped slim retains the skill's measured effect, as ep-partition's mechanical with-operational arm did (d_op +0.207 vs d_full +0.154, ordering judge-robust).
executor: claude -p --model sonnet, CLAUDE_EFFORT=medium, empty external cwd (WSL-native default /tmp/claude-1000/hx_ep_slim_cwd, HERMETIC_CWD-overridable, checked empty of CLAUDE.md), tools denied (Skill Task Read Grep Glob Bash Edit Write WebFetch WebSearch NotebookEdit), user CLAUDE.md relocated (HERMETIC_RELOCATE_USER_MEMORY=1, trap-restored), prompt via stdin, --append-system-prompt = BASE_SYS + treatment for non-without arms; identical recipe to 2026-07-18-ep-partition
grading: reuses benchmarks/2026-07-08-skills-hermetic/{grade,prosecute_counts}.workflow.js (model sonnet), blind (arm withheld); headline met_final = min(grader_met, prosecutor_met) per ADR 0025. Grok cross-family lane (grok_regrade.py) runs on the identical blinded items and is a SHIP-GATE CO-JUDGE this run (pre-registered upgrade from ep-partition's divergence-check role): the ship rule must hold under BOTH judges, mirroring bs-iter3's both-judges bar.

ship_rule.rule: SHIP the slim skill iff, under BOTH judges independently: (a) NOT slim_loses, where slim_loses = contrast_sf (with-slim minus with-full) eval-clustered 95% CI excludes 0 with negative mean; AND (b) mean(d_slim) > 0 (directional benefit over bare). Otherwise NO-SHIP: revert the skill edits and ship the measurement record alone (bs-iter3 pattern). Computed, not asserted, by aggregate.py (reads: slim_loses / slim_retains / slim_beats / slim_effect_confirmed / ship_this_judge / ship_final).
ship_rule.burden_asymmetry_justification: the change is a pure cut: treatment chars drop (chars_delta asserted < 0 in aggregate.py), so the cost prong of ADR 0024's benefit-per-token ratio improves by construction and bs-iter3's chars_delta <= 0 requirement auto-passes. The benefit side already has prior evidence: ep-partition measured the operational partition carrying the full effect under both judge families (d_op >= d_full at every point estimate; conceptual inert under both). The remaining risk this run guards is that the hand-shipped slim differs from the mechanical operational arm (TOC restoration, demotions) or that the partition result fails to replicate on a fresh draw -- hence a no-measurable-LOSS bar plus directional-positive sanity, not a fresh CI-excludes-0 existence proof (which n=6 straddled even for the full skill's replication, d_op CI [-0.033,+0.448]).
ship_rule.kill_condition: slim_loses true under EITHER judge, or mean(d_slim) <= 0 under either judge -> NO-SHIP, revert draft, record ships alone; the follow-up then diagnoses at transcript level per ADR 0024 2b before any retry.

slim_construction.basis: shipped slim SKILL.md body + 3 refs are the ep-partition partition/operational/ variants (the measured arm-C sources), byte-identical EXCEPT: (1) trailing newlines added (POSIX), (2) Table of Contents blocks restored to design-review.md and ssot-enforcement.md because validate.py requires a TOC on references > 6000 chars -- TOCs were ruled navigation-not-content by the partition SPEC and are present in the with-full arm too, so the contrast is not confounded by them
slim_construction.demotions_to_deep_theory_ref: conceptual material demoted into references/ENGINEERING_PRINCIPLES.md (never part of the treatment construction, 07-09 through this run): Lean Applicability by Domain table (from SKILL.md), parent-child design rationale + 'fixing design is cheap' (from design-review.md, absorbed into its Design First section), DRY quote with Hunt & Thomas attribution (from ssot-enforcement.md, into Key Quotes), person-blame root-cause line (from root-cause-analysis.md Deming's Insight; the Deming quote itself was already there)
slim_construction.cut_outright: SKILL.md intro line + Foundational Role paragraph; ssot-enforcement 'When information exists in multiple places' bullets + SSoT definition intro sentence (already in ENGINEERING_PRINCIPLES.md Foundations table); root-cause-analysis intro line; design-review intro sentence 2 (moved to EP.md)
slim_construction.ep_md_budget_cuts: ENGINEERING_PRINCIPLES.md has a 12000-char validator cap (was 11946); to fit the demotions, two low-signal subsections were cut from it: 'Context Windows as Physical Constraints' (restated the section intro's A3 analogy five ways) and 'AI vs Human Consumption' (uncited generalities duplicating the adjacent Context Engineering Principles rows). File lands at 11957 chars. These never ship in any treatment arm, so they cannot affect the measurement.
slim_construction.treatment_blindness_guard: prep.py implements ADR 0024 2d: derives the touched-file set from git diff vs full_commit and fails loudly if the draft touches any file outside the treatment set other than the pre-registered exclusion references/ENGINEERING_PRINCIPLES.md (the demotion target, definitionally outside the treatment) and evals/ (harness input).

prescreen.rule: bare frac_met >= 0.85 on a committed prior run = saturated, drop before spending new generation (ADR 0076 spirit: don't re-measure what's already recorded).
prescreen.source: benchmarks/2026-07-18-ep-partition/results.jsonl, 'without' column (same-day bare arm, same 6 evals, same evals.json content -- unchanged since commit 97a7c0e)
prescreen.result: E1 0.833, E2 0.800, E3 0.778, E4 0.400, E5 0.000, E6 0.267 -- none >= 0.85, none dropped; E1 flagged borderline again. All 6 evals proceed (6 evals x 3 arms x 3 reps = 54 cells).

cost.estimate_note: same measured priors as ep-partition metadata.json (ADR 0076; derived from 2026-07-17-code-standards-remeasure actuals, single-turn tool-denied text cells, same harness family): generation = 18 x $0.24 + 36 x $0.32 = $15.84; grading (blind grader + prosecutor + grok co-judge lane) ~$4-9 per the ep-partition/bs-iter3 comparables. Total estimate ~$20-25 all-in; ceiling_usd = 2x the upper estimate (ADR 0073).

actuals.generation_usd: token counts not captured by the bash harness (same recorded deviation as ep-partition; 56 sonnet text cells incl. 2-cell pilot, zero retries)
actuals.grok_lane: 54/54 graded, 0 errors, 3 parallel shards; zero marginal cost lane
